task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Tesla Model 3 (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $47490.00 and wholesale is $34392.00. Product features: Electric sedan with 272-mile range and autopilot capabilities. Reference: https://www.tesla.com/model3

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Tesla Model 3. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Tesla Model 3. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
